heroTitle:
Give 7 days free.
Get 7 days free.
heroSub: Share your code with a friend who needs the Finnish taxi exam. When they sign up, you both get a free week added.
step1: Share your code **{{code}}** with a friend preparing for the taxi exam.
step2: They sign up and enter your code. They get **7 days free** on their subscription.
step3: You automatically get **7 days added** to your account. No limit on referrals.
shareMessage: Use my code {{code}} to get 7 days free on TaxiPilot — the Finnish taxi exam prep app! https://taxipilot.fi
